step.title: Assess release scope
step.action: Review the sprint-status to determine which stories and features are included in this release.

step.title: Version strategy
step.action: Determine the version number based on semver and the scope of changes (major, minor, patch).

step.title: Changelog
step.action: Compile a changelog from all completed stories, including features, fixes, and breaking changes.

step.title: Migration notes
step.action: Document any migration steps required: database migrations, config changes, API changes, deprecations.

step.title: Produce release plan
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with release plan details.
